title: × amarcrinum howardii
intro: × Amarcrinum howardii is a rare, sterile hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Amaryllis belladonna and Crinum x powellii. This plant contains compounds that have been reported to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and inflammation. The health benefits associated with × amarcrinum howardii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
